query: Can you give my AI assistant its own inbox so it can receive customer emails and draft replies?
I need an agent email address that can monitor invoices, classify messages, and ask me before replying.
Build a workflow where a bot receives mail, searches for support tickets, labels them, and sends approved responses.
Our automation should send outbound status notifications and also read inbound replies in one agent mailbox.
How should I connect an AI agent to Sendmux email without exposing a root key at runtime?
Let my AI agent self-register an inbox and invite me as the owner.
Install the Sendmux CLI and create profiles.
Create a Sendmux domain and mailbox key from the terminal.
Write the JSON body for one Sendmux email attachment.
Search unread invoices in an existing Sendmux mailbox using snippets.
